title: Linux pulls support for ancient CPU — unsurprisingly, Linus Torvald says there is 'zero real reason' to keep a 37-year-old Intel 486 CPU going
description: Linux kernel drops support for Intel 486 CPUs, prioritizing modern architectures, while retro users can still run old software and Linux apps.

title: Letter: Fossil fuel industry needs to be held accountable
The Huns terrorised Rome's frontiers – but wanted to keep the ancient empire alive
description: Feared as savage invaders, the Huns posed a serious threat to Rome – but their goal wasn’t conquest, or Roman annihilation

title: Ancient ‘desert kites’ reveal early mass hunting in western Saudi Arabia
description: article author: SPA Author: Sat, 2026-04-11 14:58 RIYADH: Densely scattered across the volcanic fields (harrats) in western Saudi Arabia, the mysterious stone structures known as “desert kites” were once used as mass animal traps and attest to ancient environmental adaptation and engineering prowess. According to the Saudi Geological Survey, these structures are located in Harrat Khaybar and date back over 5,000 years to the Early Bronze Age, making them among the oldest and largest stone monuments in the Arabian Peninsula. Main category: Saudi Arabia Tags: archaelogy

title: Global nonfiction: From ancient classics to ’90s’ music, six new books explore humans and time
description: A biography of rock band Oasis, the mystery of ‘mad monk’ Rasputin, the joys of classic literature, and more.
